mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing units sold (HOUST) above the 6-month moving average signals a strengthening housing market that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with HOUST above the 6-month average are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in initial unemployment claims (UNRATE) above 0.5% signals a weakening labor market that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with UNRATE above 0.5% are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above the 6-month moving average signals a strengthening supply chain that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with INDPRO above the 6-month average are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the federal funds rate above 2.5% signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in periods with FEDFUNDS above 2.5% are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real GDP (GDPC1) above the 6-month moving average signals a strengthening economy that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with GDPC1 above the 6-month average are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decrease in initial unemployment claims (UNRATE) below 3.5% signals a strengthening labor market that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with UNRATE below 3.5% are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real GDP (GDPC1) above the 6-month moving average and a 3-month increase in housing units sold (HOUST) above the 6-month average signals a strengthening economy and housing market that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with both GDPC1 above the 6-month average and HOUST above the 6-month average are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).
